companyNameJapanese: アムコー・テクノロジー
description: World's second-largest OSAT company. Provides semiconductor packaging and test services including advanced SiP, flip chip, wire bond BGA, and wafer-level packaging. Major operations in Korea, Japan, China, Malaysia, Vietnam, Philippines, and Portugal.

_externalRelationships.notes: World #2 OSAT with 15.2% market share. FY2024 revenue: $6.32B. HQ in Tempe, Arizona, USA. Apple and Qualcomm together represent 41% of total sales. Record Advanced SiP revenue in 2024. New facility ramped in Vietnam.
